name: the primitive type called they

VINIT.justification: The raw unclassified data stream before fidelity assessment.

TANCH.justification: The terminal classification of the signal as a threshold-limited type.

AFWD.justification: The forward transformation of the signal toward the detection threshold.

AREV.justification: The reverse transformation or reduction of signal to the noise floor.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of discrete signal samples.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity operation verifying the signal matches its own signature.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the signal into supra-threshold and sub-threshold paths.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the total signal energy from the split paths.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the signal meets the η threshold.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the signal fails the η threshold.

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice where the signal is exactly at the threshold boundary.

IFIX.justification: The permanent record of the fidelity classification event.

steps.domain_action: integrate signal components for total energy verification
